name: Chick Pea- Zucchini Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preferably use thin egg noodles or whole wheat spaghetti for the pasta.
2. Garnish: Slice green parts of scallions very thin lengthwise and drop them into ice water to curl; set aside.
3. Bring a large pot of water to boil and cook pasta until al dente.
4. While pasta is cooking, heat safflower oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add onion, garlic, mushrooms, and zucchini; sauté until zucchini is tender but not mushy.
6. Stir in the remaining ingredients (chick peas, tomato paste, curry powder, water, and black pepper); cook over medium heat, covered, for about 8 minutes.
7. When pasta is done, drain well.
8. Spoon vegetables over pasta; garnish with scallion curls.
Variations:
- Add 1-2 tbsp finely minced gingerroot; sauté with the vegetables.
- Serve on beds of hot cooked brown rice or couscous.
Note: Vegans are strict vegetarians who consume neither animal flesh nor animal products, including dairy. This dish fits into a vegan diet as chick peas and pasta form a complete protein together.
